ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, syncing will create a new note per pin
ast.target: 启用后，同步将为每个收藏创建一条新笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The path to store pins in when using the one note per pin setting
ast.target: 使用每个固定项一条笔记设置时用于存储固定项的路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: An optional tag to add to all notes created to match pinboard pins
ast.target: 可选标签，添加到为匹配 Pinboard 固定项而创建的所有笔记中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of recent posts the plugin will read to sync
ast.target: 插件将读取以同步的最近帖子数量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Markdown heading to use when adding the Pinboard links to a daily note
ast.target: 将 Pinboard 链接添加到每日笔记时使用的 Markdown 标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, pins will be synced to the day's daily note
ast.target: 启用后，固定项将同步到当天的每日笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of seconds the plugin will wait before syncing again
ast.target: 插件再次同步前等待的秒数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prefix added to Pinboard tags when imported into Obsidian (e.g. #pinboard/work)
ast.target: 导入到 Obsidian 时添加到 Pinboard 标签的前缀（例如 #pinboard/work）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a new line (instead of a space) to separate url, description and tags
ast.target: 使用换行（而非空格）分隔 url、描述和标签

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enabling sync will backfill your recent Pinboard into Obsidian. This means potentially creating or modifying hundreds of notes. Make sure to test the plugin in a test vault before continuing.
ast.target: 启用同步会将你最近的 Pinboard 书签回填到 Obsidian。这可能会创建或修改数百条笔记。继续之前请确保在测试库中测试该插件。
